issue_summary: Remove unnecessary NaN checks from LongRange#verifyAndEncode
javadoc_before:
/** * encode the ranges into a sortable byte array ({@code Double.NaN} not allowed) * *

example for 4 dimensions (8 bytes per dimension value): minD1 ... minD4 | maxD1 ... maxD4 */
javadoc_after:
/** * encode the ranges into a sortable byte array * *

example for 4 dimensions (8 bytes per dimension value): minD1 ... minD4 | maxD1 ... maxD4 */
